# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  profile: default
  values:
    global:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
    meshConfig:
      disablePolicyAndRouteValidation: true
      enableDefaultEgress: false
    pilot:
      autoscaleEnabled: false
    tracing:
      sampling: 100.0
    security:
      enableMutualTLS: false
      tlsBackendValidation: false

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: sidecar
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - '*'
    ports:
    - number: 15000
      protocol: TCP
  service:
    exposePort: true

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin
spec:
  hosts:
  - '*'
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /config_dump
      headers:
        request:
          values:
            x-envoy-internal: "true"
    - uri:
        prefix: /stats
      headers:
        request:
          values:
            x-envoy-internal: "true"
    - uri:
        prefix: /clusters
      headers:
        request:
          values:
            x-envoy-internal: "true"
  route:
  - destination:
      host: '*'
      port:
        number: 15000
